scope: Artifact-only closure for the MBTI64 V2.1 8-page pilot content revision chain. No CMS write, promotion, sitemap/llms release, queue enqueue, approval, submit, or frontend runtime change was performed by this PR.

verified_chain.summary: Production command was draft-only and idempotent; no publish, index, sitemap/llms, search release, or runtime update was attempted.
Eight draft revisions existed with matching source SHA, snapshot keys, and draft-only safety holds. Live HTML had zero draft phrase leakage.
Eight rows were promoted to live CMS content. Side effects were bounded: no index, sitemap/llms, search release, queue enqueue, or external calls were attempted.
Eight live pilot pages passed the promoted content, canonical, FAQ, and same-origin private-route hygiene checks.

Eight URLs were HTTP 200, self-canonical, index/follow, present in sitemap.xml, llms.txt, and llms-full.txt, with no private route hits. The only warning was that Search Channel recheck still needed a fresh production run.

verified_chain.evidence: Production /tmp artifacts reported after backend URL Truth handoff write: MBTI64-URL-TRUTH-HANDOFF-PRODUCTION-WRITE-2026-06-19, MBTI64-SEARCH-CHANNEL-URL-TRUTH-RECHECK-2026-06-19-AFTER-WRITE, and MBTI64-SEARCH-QUEUE-RELEASE-DRY-RUN-2026-06-19.
